entry.title: New: CR 24-70 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending FIRST READING of Bill 100, CD1 (2024), to permit composting and co-composting operations as a principal use in the County’s Agricultural District, subject to the restrictions of Chapter 205, Hawai‘i Revised Statutes.

Agriculture, Diversification, Environment, and Public Transportation Committee

View on the council site
